verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Well, I’ve been to the river and I’ve been baptized, I’ve been washed in the blood of the Lamb; I’ve been changed from the creature that once I was, And Redeemed’ is now my name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’ve been changed! I am new born now, All my life has been rearranged; What a difference it made, When the Lord came and stayed In my heart, Oh yes, I’ve been changed.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Satan once ruled my heart but Jesus rescued me, By His Grace, I can say I’ve been redeemed; I’ve been changed from the nature that once held me, Where I was bound, I now am free.
